data.title: Kaito Futures Trade At $1.3693 On Aevo With Significant Volume
data.description: According to BlockBeats, as of February 20, Kaito futures on the Aevo platform are currently priced at $1.3693. The 24-hour trading volume for these futures has reached $271,300.

data.title: AVE.AI completes Binance Wallet integration
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, AVE.AI completed the access to Binance Wallet on February 20.
A relevant person in charge of AVE said: "By connecting to Binance Wallet, AVE users, especially BSC users, can improve the on-chain trading experience, better connect to the BSC ecosystem, and better meet the growing BSC Meme market demand."
It is reported that AVE recently connected to the BSC ecological internal disk launch platform and supported external disk Meme, and established a one-stop experience for BSC Meme transactions. At present, AVE supports more than 40 portrait dimensions and market signals, and App, trading robots and PC terminals support multiple major ecological chain markets and transactions such as BNBChain, Solana and Ethereum.

data.title: BitMart will list PAIN (PAIN)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch PAIN (PAIN) at 12:00 (Eastern Time) on February 19, and the PAIN/USDT trading pair will be opened. PAIN is the Meme coin on the Solana chain.

data.title: Nexus Orchestrator is dealing with a high volume of requests and DoS attacks, the team is working to keep the network open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nexus posted on X that Nexus Orchestrator is dealing with a large number of requests and DoS attacks. The team is doing its best to keep the network open. Please stay tuned for further progress.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 97,000 USDT with a 1.27% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 20, 2025, 02:50 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 97,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 97,030.5 USDT, with a narrowed 1.27% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bithumb will launch KAITO Korean Won trading pair
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bithumb is about to launch the KAITO Korean won trading pair, and the trading start time is to be determined.

data.title: Barclays: Bank of Japan expected to raise interest rates at a rate of half a year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Yesterday, Bank of Japan board member Takada Hajime made a hawkish statement, supporting the continued gradual rate hike. Barclays expects the Bank of Japan to raise interest rates at a rate of once every six months, but Barclays also warned that the timing of the rate hike may be advanced, depending on how the Trump administration views the depreciation of the yen. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bank Of Japan Official Advocates Gradual Interest Rate Hikes
data.description: According to Odaily, Bank of Japan Policy Board member Takata Hajime recently expressed hawkish views, advocating for a continued gradual increase in interest rates. Barclays anticipates that the Bank of Japan will raise rates every six months. However, Barclays also cautions that the timing of these hikes could be advanced, depending on how U.S. President Donald Trump's administration perceives the depreciation of the yen.

data.title: Tether Launches TradeFi To Enhance Global Trade Efficiency
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether's CEO Paolo Ardoino has announced the launch of TradeFi, a new service aimed at enhancing global trade through innovative financing solutions. This addition expands Tether's growing portfolio, which already includes stablecoins, asset tokenization, and wallet development tools. TradeFi is designed to streamline international trade by offering cost-reducing and efficiency-boosting financing solutions. The platform will facilitate the trading of major commodities such as crude oil and copper, utilizing USDT for seamless settlement. Tether's website states, "With the support of blockchain technology, we are simplifying trade processes, reducing costs, and promoting financial inclusion across industries and borders." The launch of TradeFi follows Tether's initial crude oil transaction last November, where the company financed a $45 million deal involving 670,000 barrels of oil in the Middle East. While details of the participating companies were not disclosed, Ardoino described this as the first step in a broader strategy to support more commodities and industries.

data.title: The PAIN team-related addresses have sold $2.53 million worth of tokens in the past 7 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, the PAIN team-related address has sold tokens worth $2.53 million in the past 7 hours.
The address DjTrV...1a24a sold 107,212 PAIN at an average price of $23.66. The source of its funds was traced back to the team's pre-sale related address, not the 20% coin holding address for the airdrop. The tokens were transferred three times before shipment.
